description: MORIE Toolkit: Multi-domain Open Research and Inferential Estimation -- dual-language (Python + R) toolkit hosting the MRM (Multilevel Reconciliation Methodology) framework.
rmorie: R-only lite version of MORIE. CRAN+rOpenSci focused; strict-business carve with no Python dependencies, slim inst/extdata, security-hardened CI.
rmoriedata: Bundled open-data fixtures for rmorie. Data-only companion package; no exported functions.
rmorielite: R-only lite carve of MORIE scoped to data retrieval (Ontario OTIS + federal SIU). Polite-by-default fetching, manifest-aware caching, schema-validated ingestion.
